## Overview

HubSpot is a US-headquartered (Cambridge, Massachusetts) public-company CRM and marketing platform with a strong UK presence through HubSpot Ltd. The product is widely used by SMEs and mid-market companies across the UK, including consultancies and professional services firms. The "forever free" CRM tier is a primary attraction for SME-scale practices, with paid tiers (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) layered on for marketing automation, sales automation, service operations, and CMS. UK / EU data residency is available; GDPR-aligned DPAs are standard. HubSpot is recommended as the v1 CRM for ArcKit Consulting on the basis of strong free-tier coverage, transparent published pricing, and integration depth across the recommended operating tooling stack.

## Products & Services

- **HubSpot CRM (Free)** — contacts, companies, deals, basic pipeline, basic reporting; covers v1 ArcKit Consulting needs at zero cost.
- **HubSpot Sales Hub Starter** — task automation, custom properties, removes branding; £20/user/month.
- **HubSpot Sales Hub Professional** — advanced automation, sales playbooks, forecasting; £105/user/month.
- **HubSpot Sales Hub Enterprise** — advanced reporting, predictive lead scoring, custom objects; custom pricing.
- **Other Hubs** — Marketing Hub, Service Hub, Operations Hub, Content Hub — each with Free / Starter / Pro / Enterprise tiers.

## Pricing Model

- **Per-seat subscription** with published list prices.
- **Free tier** is genuinely usable (not a trial) — basic CRM functionality for up to 1m contacts.
- **Starter** at £20 / user / month (5+ user discounts available).
- **Professional** at £105 / user / month.
- **Enterprise** at custom pricing typically £3,600+/month for full enterprise feature set.
- Annual billing standard; monthly billing slightly higher.

## UK Government Presence

- G-Cloud listed: Yes (HubSpot is listed on the UK Government Digital Marketplace G-Cloud, last verified at G-Cloud 14 listing).
- DOS listed: No (HubSpot is a software product, not a specialist supplier).
- UK data centres: Yes (UK / EU residency available; data centres in EU and US, with EU residency configurable).

## Strengths

- Best-in-class **forever-free CRM tier** — covers v1 ArcKit Consulting pipeline needs at zero cost; not a trial, not capped at 30 days.
- **Transparent published pricing** for Starter and Pro tiers; aligns with Principle 1 / Principle 17.
- **Strong integration ecosystem** — pre-built connectors to Harvest (time tracking), QuickBooks / Xero (accounting), Microsoft 365 (email / calendar), Slack, Zoom, etc.
- **UK / EU data residency** option with GDPR-aligned DPA.
- **SME-friendly UI** — minimal training overhead; consultants can self-serve.
- **Marketing flywheel** built in — content marketing, email, landing pages — useful for the practice's brand-building activities.

## Weaknesses

- **Aggressive upsell pressure** at higher tiers; Enterprise tier pricing is opaque (custom).
- **Multi-team functionality** (separate teams with separate pipelines) requires Professional or higher.
- Some governance-critical features (advanced audit log, custom roles) gated behind Enterprise — though for v1 ArcKit Consulting scale, the Starter or Pro tier is sufficient.
- **US-headquartered**; EU residency requires explicit configuration.
